results.rendered_html: vṛṣalī f. a woman of low caste, Śūdra woman,  ŚBr.  &c. &c. ( L.  also ‘an unmarried girl twelve years old in whom menstruation has commenced; a woman during menstruation; a barren woman; the mother of a stillborn child’).

results.rendered_html:
vṛṣalī
1 An unmarried girl twelve years old; particularly, a girl remaining unmarried at her father's house in whom menstruation has commenced; piturgehe ca yā nārī rajaḥ paśyatyasaṃskṛtā . bhrūṇahatyā pitustasyāḥ sā kanyā vṛṣalī smṛtā ...
2 A woman during menstruation.
3 A barren woman.
4 The mother of a stillborn child.
5 A Śūdra female, or the wife of a Śūdra.
Comp.
— patiḥ the husband of a Śūdra woman.
— sevanaṃ intercourse with a Śūdra female.
